turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" role="img" aria-label="read">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f7f0e6"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#e7dccb"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background (transparent) -->

  <!-- Magnifying glass -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <circle cx="360" cy="190" r="58" fill="none" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="10"/>
    <circle cx="360" cy="190" r="36" fill="none" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.35"/>
    <line x1="405" y1="235" x2="470" y2="300" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Open book -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <!-- Left cover shadow -->
    <path d="M120 190 C140 170, 200 160, 250 175 L250 365 C200 350, 140 360, 120 385 Z" fill="#3a3a3a" opacity="0.22"/>
    <path d="M250 175 C300 160, 360 170, 390 190 L390 385 C360 360, 300 350, 250 365 Z" fill="#3a3a3a" opacity="0.18"/>

    <!-- Book spine -->
    <path d="M248 170 C252 168, 260 168, 264 170 L264 370 C260 372, 252 372, 248 370 Z" fill="#d8c6a6" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6"/>

    <!-- Left page -->
    <path d="M120 190 C145 160, 205 150, 250 170 L250 365 C205 350, 145 360, 120 385 Z" fill="url(#g1)" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6"/>
    <!-- Right page -->
    <path d="M390 190 C365 160, 305 150, 250 170 L250 365 C305 350, 365 360, 390 385 Z" fill="#f2eadc" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6"/>

    <!-- Inner page lines (no text) -->
    <g stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.55">
      <path d="M165 235 C205 220, 235 220, 240 225" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M165 265 C205 250, 235 250, 240 255" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M165 295 C205 280, 235 280, 240 285" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M165 325 C205 310, 235 310, 240 315" fill="none"/>

      <path d="M290 225 C315 220, 345 220, 355 235" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M290 255 C315 250, 345 250, 355 265" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M290 285 C315 280, 345 280, 355 295" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M290 315 C315 310, 345 310, 355 325" fill="none"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Book base/stand -->
    <path d="M95 395 C145 420, 205 430, 256 430 C307 430, 367 420, 417 395" fill="none" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>
    <path d="M115 410 C160 430, 215 440, 256 440 C297 440, 352 430, 397 410" fill="none" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Subtle reading emphasis rays near the magnifying glass -->
  <g opacity="0.25" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round">
    <line x1="318" y1="132" x2="290" y2="112"/>
    <line x1="402" y1="132" x2="430" y2="112"/>
    <line x1="440" y1="200" x2="474" y2="195"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating an SVG for "read"**

I need to design an SVG drawing for the word "read" as part of a guessing game. I'm thinking of using an open book icon along with a magnifying glass to represent reading but without any letters. I want to ensure that the book is centered and shows pages with lines, while the magnifying glass points at the text area. I'll make sure to specify it in a JSON format with a size of 512x512.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
